engineGuide.h2: Vauxhall Antara Engine Codes - Full Technical Specifications & Replacement Guide
engineGuide.h3: Every engine code fitted to the Vauxhall Antara across all generations, with technical specs, compatible variants and trims, known failure points, and average rebuilt prices from UK specialists. Select any engine code to compare quotes.

entries.title: 2.0L Diesel
entries.history: The dominant pre-facelift diesel, Z20DMH powered most UK Antaras but earned a reputation for rear-mounted timing chain tensioner wear.
compatibleVariants: 2.0 CDTi S, 2.0 CDTi SE, 2.0 CDTi Exclusiv, 2.0 CDTi 4x4, 2.0 CDTi Auto
commonFailures: Timing chain tensioner wear (60k-100k miles)
Injector seal degradation causing hard starting
Turbo oil feed line clogging
entries.cta: Get quotes for Z20DMH Vauxhall Antara engine replacement

entries.title: 2.0L Diesel
entries.history: Facelift-era update to the 2.0 CDTi with revised emissions hardware; more reliable timing system but prone to EGR-related issues.
compatibleVariants: 2.0 CDTi SE, 2.0 CDTi SE Nav, 2.0 CDTi Exclusiv, 2.0 CDTi Diamond
commonFailures: EGR valve carbon buildup and failure
DPF regeneration issues on short journeys
Injector coding faults post-replacement
entries.cta: Get quotes for A22DM Vauxhall Antara engine replacement

entries.title: 2.2L Diesel
entries.history: Pre-facelift high-output diesel offering strong torque; robust bottom end but vulnerable to DPF clogging without regular motorway use.
compatibleVariants: 2.2 CDTi SE, 2.2 CDTi Exclusiv, 2.2 CDTi Diamond, 2.2 CDTi 4x4
commonFailures: DPF clogging and forced regeneration failures
Injector failure causing white smoke and hard starting
Timing chain guide wear at high mileage
entries.cta: Get quotes for Z22D1 Vauxhall Antara engine replacement

entries.title: 2.2L Diesel
entries.history: Facelift-era 2.2 CDTi with updated common-rail system; improved emissions but injector seal failures remain a common replacement driver.
compatibleVariants: 2.2 CDTi SE Nav, 2.2 CDTi Exclusiv, 2.2 CDTi Diamond, 2.2 CDTi 182hp
commonFailures: Injector seal failure causing fuel dilution
Turbo actuator sticking and boost loss
EGR cooler leakage on high-mileage examples
entries.cta: Get quotes for R9M452 Vauxhall Antara engine replacement

entries.title: 2.2L Diesel
entries.history: High-output 182hp variant reserved for top-spec Diamond trims; powerful but demands meticulous oil maintenance to avoid bearing wear.
commonFailures: Crankshaft bearing wear on high-mileage examples
Turbo failure secondary to oil degradation
DPF/EGR combined failure on urban-use vehicles

entries.title: 1.6L Diesel
entries.history: Late-introduction efficiency-focused diesel; less common in UK but sought after for lower tax and urban usability.
commonFailures: Turbo oil seal leaks causing blue smoke
DPF clogging due to small displacement and urban use
EGR valve carbon buildup and sticking

entries.title: 2.4L Petrol
entries.history: The flagship petrol option for early Antaras; smooth and refined but prone to head gasket failure under load or with infrequent servicing.
compatibleVariants: 2.4 Petrol S, 2.4 Petrol SE, 2.4 Petrol Exclusiv, 2.4 Petrol 4x4
commonFailures: Head gasket failure causing coolant/oil mixing
Oil consumption from piston ring wear
Thermostat housing leaks and overheating

entries.history: Entry-level petrol option for early Antaras; adequate performance but vulnerable to oil sludge if service intervals are extended.

commonProblems.h2: Vauxhall Antara Engine Problems - What It Costs to Fix & When Replacement Makes Sense
commonProblems.h3: The Vauxhall Antara's 2.0 CDTi and 2.2 CDTi diesel engines dominate UK replacement demand, with timing chain stretch, DPF clogging and EGR failures the most reported issues. Every rebuilt engine supplied through EngineMarket includes upgraded internal components designed to address the original failure point - plus a 12-month unlimited mileage warranty. Use the cost comparisons below to decide whether repair or replacement offers better value for your Antara.

problems.h4: Timing Chain Failure - Why Z20DMH/Z22D1 Engines Fail Prematurely
problems.affectedModels: Vauxhall Antara 2.0 CDTi, 2.2 CDTi (2006-2011, Z20DMH, Z22D1, A22DM)
problems.rootCause: Rear-mounted timing chain tensioner wear allows chain slack, leading to rattling noise and potential catastrophic engine damage if ignored.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Chain, tensioner, guides replaced before failure
repairOptions.longevity: 60k-80k miles if caught early; not viable post-failure

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Complete rebuilt unit with upgraded tensioner, bench-tested, supply & fit available
repairOptions.longevity: 80k+ miles with proper maintenance; best value post-catastrophic failure

problems.recommendation: If you hear a rattling noise from the rear of the engine before 80k miles, a preventative chain replacement at a specialist offers the best value. Once the chain has jumped or broken, replacement with a rebuilt unit is almost always more economical than attempting a repair on a damaged block.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt Z20DMH/Z22D1 engine prices for your Vauxhall Antara

problems.h4: DPF & EGR System Failure - Common on High-Mileage 2.2 CDTi Units
problems.affectedModels: Vauxhall Antara 2.2 CDTi Exclusiv, Diamond, SE Nav (2006-2015, Z22D1, R9M452, Z22DTH)
problems.rootCause: Short-journey driving prevents DPF regeneration; soot buildup combines with EGR carbon deposits, restricting exhaust flow and triggering limp mode.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: DPF removed for professional cleaning or replacement; EGR valve cleaned or blanked
repairOptions.longevity: 20k-40k miles if driving patterns change; may recur on short journeys

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Complete rebuilt unit with updated emissions hardware, bench-tested, supply & fit available
repairOptions.longevity: 80k+ miles; ideal if DPF/EGR issues compound with other wear

problems.recommendation: If your Antara is used primarily for short trips, a DPF delete (where legally permissible) combined with EGR blanking can be a cost-effective solution. However, if the engine also shows signs of turbo wear or injector issues, investing in a rebuilt unit with upgraded components offers better long-term value.
problems.cta: Get quotes for R9M452/Z22DTH Vauxhall Antara engine replacement

problems.h4: Injector Failure - Expensive Repair Often Leading to Replacement
problems.affectedModels: Vauxhall Antara 2.0/2.2 CDTi All Trims (2006-2015, Z20DMH, A22DM, R9M452)
problems.rootCause: Piezo injector seals degrade, allowing fuel leakage into cylinders; causes hard starting, white smoke, and potential piston damage if ignored.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Faulty injector replaced, coded to ECU, system pressure tested
repairOptions.longevity: 30k-50k miles; other injectors may fail soon after

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Complete rebuilt unit with new/remanufactured injectors, bench-tested, supply & fit available
repairOptions.longevity: 80k+ miles; best option if multiple injectors failing or engine has high mileage

problems.recommendation: If only one injector has failed and the engine is under 90k miles with good service history, replacement of the single unit is viable. If multiple injectors are failing or the engine has exceeded 100k miles, a rebuilt engine with new injectors fitted offers better value and reliability.
problems.cta: Compare injector-ready rebuilt engines for your Vauxhall Antara

problems.h4: Turbocharger Failure - Often Secondary to Oil or DPF Issues
problems.affectedModels: Vauxhall Antara 2.0/2.2 CDTi, 1.6 CDTi (2006-2015, All Diesel Codes)
problems.rootCause: Oil starvation from clogged feed lines or excessive soot from DPF failure causes turbo bearing wear, leading to loss of boost, blue smoke, and potential engine contamination.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Turbo removed, replaced with new/remanufactured unit, oil lines flushed
repairOptions.longevity: 40k-70k miles if root cause addressed; risk of repeat failure

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Complete rebuilt unit with new turbo fitted, all oil passages cleaned, bench-tested
repairOptions.longevity: 80k+ miles; eliminates risk of turbo debris damaging new unit

problems.recommendation: If turbo failure occurred suddenly with no prior warning signs and the engine has under 100k miles, a standalone turbo replacement may suffice. If the failure was preceded by oil pressure warnings, DPF issues, or the engine has high mileage, a rebuilt engine with new turbo is the safer, more economical long-term choice.
problems.cta: Find turbo-ready rebuilt engines for your Vauxhall Antara

problems.h4: Crankshaft & Bottom-End Failure - Catastrophic Damage Requiring Replacement
problems.affectedModels: Vauxhall Antara 2.2 CDTi High Output, 2.4 Petrol (2006-2015, Z22DTH, Z24XE)
problems.rootCause: Bearing wear from oil degradation or timing chain failure allows crankshaft movement, causing knocking noise, loss of oil pressure, and complete engine seizure.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Complete rebuilt unit with new crankshaft, bearings, pistons, bench-tested, supply & fit available
repairOptions.longevity: 80k+ miles with proper maintenance; only viable option post-seizure

problems.recommendation: Once bottom-end knock or seizure occurs, repair is not economically viable. A rebuilt engine with upgraded bearings and balanced rotating assembly is the only sensible solution - and often costs less than a main dealer repair attempt.
problems.cta: Get urgent quotes for catastrophic failure replacement on your Vauxhall Antara

finalCta.h4: Don't Let Engine Failure Write Off Your Vauxhall Antara
finalCta.paragraph: The problems above represent the most common failure patterns reported by UK Vauxhall Antara owners. EngineMarket makes it simple to compare prices from trusted UK specialists who supply rebuilt, reconditioned and used engines with upgraded components addressing these known weaknesses. Every engine includes a 12-month unlimited mileage warranty and nationwide delivery - so you can get back on the road without the main dealer premium.
finalCta.buttonText: Compare Vauxhall Antara Engine Replacement Prices Now →
finalCta.disclaimer: All prices are indicative UK market ranges based on historical quote data and repair requests from our network of engine specialists. Dealer pricing is estimated based on published main dealer labour rates and genuine OEM parts pricing. Specialist pricing reflects actual quote data from EngineMarket's UK network. Actual costs vary depending on damage severity, vehicle condition, variant, and workshop location within the UK. Use our free comparison tool to get tailored quotes for your specific Vauxhall Antara and engine code. Every engine supplied through EngineMarket carries a 12-month unlimited mileage warranty - always confirm exact terms with your chosen supplier.

engineSizes.h2: Vauxhall Antara Engines by Size - Find the Right Displacement for Your Variant
engineSizes.intro: Every displacement fitted to the Vauxhall Antara across UK generations is listed below, with compatible engine codes, production years and common failure notes to help you identify the right replacement.

items.title: Vauxhall Antara 1.6L Diesel Engines
items.description: The 1.6L CDTi was introduced late in the Antara's lifecycle (2013-2015) as a more efficient option for lower-mileage urban use. While less common than the 2.0/2.2 units, it shares many components with larger diesels but is more sensitive to turbo and DPF maintenance due to its smaller displacement.
items.cta: Get quotes for Vauxhall Antara 1.6L diesel engines

items.title: Vauxhall Antara 2.0L Diesel Engines
items.description: The 2.0L CDTi was the volume seller across both pre-facelift (2006-2011) and facelift (2012-2015) Antaras, offering a balance of performance and economy. The Z20DMH code dominates early models, while A22DM appears in later facelift vehicles with updated emissions hardware.
items.cta: Get quotes for Vauxhall Antara 2.0L diesel engines

items.title: Vauxhall Antara 2.2L Diesel Engines
items.description: The 2.2L CDTi represents the most powerful diesel option in the Antara range, fitted to higher-spec Exclusiv and Diamond trims. With outputs from 163hp to 182hp, these engines are robust but demand careful maintenance of the DPF and timing system to avoid costly failures.
commonFailurePoints: crankshaft bearing wear on high-output 182hp variants
items.cta: Get quotes for Vauxhall Antara 2.2L diesel engines

items.title: Vauxhall Antara 2.0L Petrol Engines
items.description: The 2.0L petrol unit was offered only in early pre-facelift Antaras (2006-2009) and represents a small fraction of UK registrations. While less prone to DPF issues than diesel variants, oil sludge buildup from infrequent servicing can cause significant wear.
commonFailurePoints: Oil sludge buildup from extended service intervals
items.cta: Compare Vauxhall Antara 2.0L petrol engine prices

items.title: Vauxhall Antara 2.4L Petrol Engines
items.description: The 2.4L petrol was the flagship petrol option for the Antara, offering smoother refinement than the 2.0L unit but at the cost of higher fuel consumption. Head gasket failure is the most commonly reported issue, particularly on vehicles used for towing or frequent motorway driving. Not sure which engine size your Vauxhall Antara needs? Enter your registration number above - we'll identify the exact displacement, engine code and compatible replacement options instantly. All engines supplied through EngineMarket include a 12-month unlimited mileage warranty from UK Vauxhall Antara specialists.
commonFailurePoints: oil consumption due to piston ring wear
items.cta: Compare Vauxhall Antara 2.4L petrol engine prices

items.title: Vauxhall Antara Diesel Engines
items.description: Diesel engines account for over 90% of UK Antara registrations, with the 2.0 CDTi and 2.2 CDTi dominating replacement enquiries due to timing chain, DPF and injector-related failures.
items.descriptor: Diesel engines account for over 90% of UK Antara registrations, with the 2.0 CDTi and 2.2 CDTi dominating replacement enquiries due to timing chain, DPF and injector-related failures.
items.familiesLabel: Common Vauxhall Antara Diesel Engine Families
families: Z20DMH - pre-facelift 2.0 CDTi, timing chain tensioner weakness, high UK replacement volume
A22DM - facelift 2.0 CDTi, updated emissions hardware, EGR valve failure common
Z22D1/R9M452 - 2.2 CDTi pre/post facelift, DPF clogging on short-journey vehicles
Z22DTH - high-output 182hp variant, crankshaft bearing wear at high mileage
A16DTH - late-model 1.6 CDTi, turbo oil seal leaks, limited UK availability
knownFor: Strong torque and motorway fuel economy when maintained
Timing chain failure risk on pre-facelift 2.0/2.2 CDTi units
DPF/EGR issues on vehicles used primarily for short urban journeys
High UK replacement demand on SE, Exclusiv and Diamond trims
items.cta: Get quotes for Vauxhall Antara Diesel replacement engines

items.title: Vauxhall Antara Petrol Engines
items.description: Petrol Antaras represent a small but dedicated segment of the UK market, with the 2.4L unit offering smoother refinement but higher running costs and head gasket vulnerability.
items.descriptor: Petrol Antaras represent a small but dedicated segment of the UK market, with the 2.4L unit offering smoother refinement but higher running costs and head gasket vulnerability.
items.familiesLabel: Common Vauxhall Antara Petrol Engine Families
families: Z24XE/L52 - 2.4L petrol, head gasket failure common on high-mileage examples
Z20S/Z20S1 - 2.0L petrol, oil sludge issues from extended service intervals
foundIn: No petrol engines offered in facelift (2012-2015) UK models
knownFor: Smoother, quieter operation compared to diesel variants
Head gasket failure on 2.4L units, especially with towing use
Lower replacement demand but higher desperation when failure occurs
Better suited to low-mileage, urban-use Antaras
items.cta: Compare Vauxhall Antara Petrol engine prices

engineYears.h2: Vauxhall Antara Engines by Year - What Was Fitted & When
engineYears.intro: This timeline covers all major engine changes across the Vauxhall Antara's UK production run (2006-2015), organised so owners can quickly identify their engine and compare rebuilt prices from UK specialists.

years.description: The Antara launched with two diesel options and one petrol, establishing the engine lineup that would define the model's UK presence.
keyChanges: Vauxhall Antara launched in UK market with 2.0 CDTi, 2.2 CDTi and 2.4 petrol options
Shared GM Theta platform with Chevrolet Captiva, influencing parts compatibility
Manual transmission standard; automatic and 4x4 offered as options
knownFor: Strong initial sales driven by competitive SUV pricing
Early reports of timing chain rattles on Z20DMH units
Petrol variants less popular but valued for smoother refinement
years.cta: Get quotes for 2006-2007 Vauxhall Antara replacement engines
years.ticker: Vauxhall Antara 2007 engine replacement • Z20DMH timing chain cost • Antara 2.0 CDTi engine for sale

years.preview: Pre-Facelift Maturity: Refinements & Growing Failure Reports
years.description: As mileage accumulated on early Antaras, timing chain and DPF issues began driving replacement enquiries for Z20DMH and Z22D1 engines.
keyChanges: Minor trim updates: SE Nav introduced, Exclusiv equipment enhanced
No major engine changes; same codes carried through
Growing owner awareness of timing chain maintenance importance
knownFor: Timing chain failure reports increasing on 60k+ mile Z20DMH units
DPF clogging becoming common on urban-use 2.2 CDTi vehicles
Petrol variants developing head gasket issues on high-mileage examples
years.cta: Compare rebuilt engine prices for 2008-2011 Vauxhall Antara
years.ticker: Antara Z22D1 DPF replacement • Vauxhall Antara 2010 engine cost • 2.4 petrol head gasket repair

years.description: The 2012 facelift brought updated diesel engines with revised emissions hardware, shifting replacement demand to A22DM and R9M452 codes.
keyChanges: Major facelift: revised front/rear styling, interior upgrades
New engine codes: A22DM (2.0 CDTi), R9M452/Z22DTH (2.2 CDTi), A16DTH (1.6 CDTi)
Stop/Start technology introduced on select variants
Euro 5 emissions compliance across diesel range
knownFor: Improved timing system reliability on A22DM vs Z20DMH
EGR valve failures becoming prominent on facelift diesels
182hp Z22DTH units developing crankshaft wear at high mileage
years.cta: Get quotes for 2012-2015 Vauxhall Antara replacement engines
years.ticker: Vauxhall Antara 2013 engine replacement • A22DM EGR valve cost • Antara 2.2 CDTi 182hp engine for sale

years.description: Engine compatibility differs significantly between pre-facelift and facelift Antaras; using the correct code is essential to avoid fitment issues.
keyChanges: Facelift (2012-2015): A22DM, R9M452, Z22DTH, A16DTH introduced
Mounting points, ECU compatibility and ancillary fittings differ between generations
popularModels: Pre-facelift: 2.0 CDTi SE, 2.2 CDTi Exclusiv, 2.4 Petrol SE
Facelift: 2.0 CDTi SE Nav, 2.2 CDTi Diamond, 1.6 CDTi SE
knownFor: Cross-generation engine swaps require ECU reprogramming and ancillary changes
DVLA registration year is unreliable for engine identification; always verify code
Breaker-sourced engines must match both year and code to ensure compatibility
years.cta: Find compatible replacement engines for your Vauxhall Antara year

engineYears.closing: Not sure which year your Vauxhall Antara was built? Enter your registration number and we'll identify the exact engine, model year, and compatible replacement options instantly - all backed by a 12-month warranty from UK Vauxhall Antara specialists.

faq.h2: Vauxhall Antara Engine Replacement - Frequently Asked Questions

items.question: Is it worth replacing the engine on a Vauxhall Antara?
items.answer: Yes, if your Antara is in good condition otherwise and has under 120k miles, a rebuilt engine from £1,800 offers excellent value versus scrappage or dealer repair costs exceeding £4,000.
keyPoints: Rebuilt engines cost £1,800-£2,900 supply-only, far below dealer repairs
Antara values £2,000-£5,000 make replacement economically sensible
12-month warranty on rebuilt units mitigates repeat failure risk
Supply & fit available nationwide for hassle-free installation
items.cta: Compare rebuilt Vauxhall Antara engine prices to see your options

items.question: How much does a Vauxhall Antara engine replacement cost UK?
items.answer: Typical UK costs range from £1,200 for a used engine to £2,900 for a rebuilt unit (supply-only), with supply & fit adding £400-£800 depending on location and variant.
keyPoints: Used engines: £600-£1,500, 3-6 month warranty typical
Reconditioned: £1,400-£2,400, 12-month warranty standard
Rebuilt: £1,800-£2,900, upgraded components, 12-month unlimited warranty
Supply & fit labour: £400-£800 added to engine price
items.cta: Get a tailored Vauxhall Antara engine quote in minutes

items.question: What are the symptoms of a failed Vauxhall Antara timing chain?
items.answer: A rattling noise from the rear of the engine on startup or acceleration, accompanied by potential loss of power or engine management light, indicates timing chain tensioner failure on Z20DMH/Z22D1 units.
keyPoints: Rattling noise most noticeable on cold start or under load
Engine management light may illuminate with timing-related codes
Ignoring symptoms risks catastrophic valve/piston damage
Preventative replacement recommended before 80k miles on pre-facelift models
items.cta: Compare timing-chain-upgraded rebuilt engines for your Antara

items.question: Will a Chevrolet Captiva engine fit a Vauxhall Antara?
items.answer: Many engines are physically compatible as both share the GM Theta platform, but ECU coding, ancillary fittings and emissions hardware often differ - always verify exact engine code match before purchasing.
keyPoints: Z20DMH, Z22D1 codes used across both Antara and Captiva ranges
ECU immobiliser and wiring loom may require reprogramming
Ancillary brackets, turbo plumbing and DPF systems can differ by model year
Using an Antara-specific rebuilt unit avoids compatibility uncertainty
items.cta: Find verified Vauxhall Antara engine replacements with guaranteed fitment

items.question: Do you supply and fit Vauxhall Antara engines nationwide?
items.answer: Yes, EngineMarket's network of UK specialists offers supply & fit services nationwide, with mobile fitting available in many regions for convenient on-site replacement.
keyPoints: Supply & fit quotes include collection, fitting, fluids and road test
Mobile fitting available for many postcodes - check during quote process
Typical labour add-on: £400-£800 depending on variant and location
All supply & fit work covered under the same 12-month warranty
items.cta: Get a supply & fit quote for your Vauxhall Antara today

items.question: What warranty comes with a Vauxhall Antara replacement engine?
items.answer: Every engine supplied through EngineMarket includes a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty, with some specialists offering extended coverage on rebuilt and remanufactured units.
keyPoints: 12-month unlimited mileage warranty standard on rebuilt/reconditioned units
Used engines typically carry 3-6 month warranty depending on supplier
Warranty covers parts and labour if fitted by network specialist
Always confirm exact terms with your chosen supplier before ordering
items.cta: Compare warranty terms across Vauxhall Antara engine suppliers

items.question: Can I get a Vauxhall Antara engine delivered next day?
items.answer: Many network specialists offer next-day delivery on in-stock rebuilt and used engines for urgent replacements, though lead times may apply for rare codes or remanufactured units.
keyPoints: Next-day delivery available on common codes: Z20DMH, A22DM, Z22D1
Rare codes (A16DTH, Z22DTH) may require 2-5 day lead time
Delivery cost typically £50-£150 depending on location and engine weight
Order before 2pm for best chance of next-day dispatch
items.cta: Check urgent delivery options for your Vauxhall Antara engine code

items.question: What is the difference between reconditioned and used Antara engines?
items.answer: Used engines are low-mileage donor units sold as-is with minimal testing; reconditioned engines are professionally cleaned, inspected and rebuilt with new gaskets, seals and worn components replaced.
keyPoints: Used: £600-£1,500, compression-tested, 3-6 month warranty typical
Reconditioned: £1,400-£2,400, new seals/gaskets, 12-month warranty standard
Reconditioned units address known failure points like timing components
Best value depends on vehicle age, mileage and intended ownership period
items.cta: Compare reconditioned vs used Vauxhall Antara engine prices

items.question: How do I find the engine code on my Vauxhall Antara?
items.answer: The engine code is stamped on the engine block near the gearbox flange or on a sticker in the engine bay; alternatively, enter your registration above for instant DVLA verification.
keyPoints: Common locations: gearbox flange, rocker cover, engine bay sticker
Codes are alphanumeric: Z20DMH, A22DM, Z22D1, etc.
DVLA lookup via registration is fastest and most reliable method
Providing the correct code ensures you receive a compatible replacement
items.cta: Enter your reg to instantly identify your Vauxhall Antara engine code

items.question: How long does a Vauxhall Antara engine last?
items.answer: With proper maintenance, Antara diesel engines can exceed 150,000 miles; however, timing chain, DPF and injector issues commonly drive replacement enquiries between 80,000-120,000 miles.
keyPoints: Well-maintained Z20DMH/A22DM units often reach 150k+ miles
Timing chain preventative replacement recommended before 80k miles
DPF/EGR issues accelerate wear on urban-use vehicles
Rebuilt engines with upgraded components can match or exceed original lifespan
items.cta: Find long-life rebuilt engines for your Vauxhall Antara
